narrative: Tata Steel was the strongest overall FY2023-24 performer, ranking 1st on turnover and net worth, with ~₹142,913.3 crore turnover and ₹134,137.5 crore net worth. JSW remained the closest absolute-scale peer at ₹133,609.0 crore turnover and ₹67,903.0 crore net worth, but the gap to Tata was wider on capital base than on revenue. SAIL was stable on turnover at ~₹104,545.1 crore and improved net worth to ₹54,130.5 crore, but remained behind Tata and JSW. Jindal Stainless continued to be the export leader at 17.07% and improved turnover to ~₹38,356.0 crore, demonstrating strong stainless demand and international market reach, but it remained the smallest by absolute financial scale. Tata’s FY2023-24 BRSR also explains a methodology issue: prior-year figures were restated following mergers and revised reporting boundaries, so the apparent improvement should be read with the restated standalone basis in mind.
